capabilities.name: Fixed price or discount %
capabilities.verify: fixed price or discount % rule type

capabilities.name: Tiered quantity discounts
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3, after the drift fix deployed): pricelist restricted to a test lead with two tiers (10% @ qty≥10, 25% @ qty≥50) on an 18000-base product; resolve_pricelist_price returned qty 5 → 18000 source=product_base, qty 12 → 16200 source=pricelist (10% tier), qty 80 → 13500 source=pricelist (25% tier) — deepest qualifying break wins, no ambiguity crash. Test data cleaned up. Mechanism: pricelist_items.min_quantity tiers; resolve_pricelist_price picks the deepest qualifying break (ORDER BY specificity, qty_break DESC) (migration 20260613020000, re-emitted in Lovable bundle 20260704211755 to defeat the drift)
capabilities.notes: Was broken on rzhj by ledger drift: resolve_pricelist_price failed at every quantity with 'column reference "price_cents" is ambiguous' because the correct ambiguity-free body (in 20260613020000) was back-dated below the ledger HEAD and skipped, leaving an older body. Caught by live verification 2026-07-04, fixed by re-emitting resolve_pricelist_price in Lovable bundle 20260704211755, deployed and re-verified live. The same drift had also broken the sibling 'price_resolution' capability on affected instances; the fix restored both.

capabilities.name: Time-based dynamic pricing
capabilities.verify: pricelist_items.days_of_week/time_start/time_end + resolve_pricelist_price p_at_time (migration 20260708050000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07 via MCP gateway: 50%-off item with 06:00–08:00 window resolved 12500 at 06:30 and fell back to 25000 base at 12:00.

capabilities.name: Customer-segment/country pricing
capabilities.verify: pricelists.segment (matches companies.tags) + pricelists.country (matches companies.country, added column) with +300/+200 specificity (20260708050000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: segment=enterprise country=SE list matched only the lead whose company carries the enterprise tag + SE country (420000), anonymous resolution fell through to product_base.

capabilities.name: Supplier/vendor pricelists
capabilities.verify: resolve_vendor_price + manage_vendor_price skills over existing vendor_products (validity dates + price_tier_min_qty tiers, preferred-first) (20260708050000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: two tiers (200000 @1, 180000 @50) resolved correctly at qty 10 and 60 via the gateway.

capabilities.name: Formula (cost+margin) pricing
capabilities.verify: pricelist_items.formula_base(cost|list)/margin_pct/surcharge_cents/rounding_cents; pricelist_items_price_or_discount constraint widened to admit formula rows (20260708050000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: cost 300000 × 1.4 rounded to 10000 → 420000 source=pricelist.

capabilities.name: Apply to POS/subscriptions
capabilities.verify: record_pos_sale_v2 resolves omitted line unit prices via resolve_pricelist_price (customer_id as lead, register currency); create_manual_subscription resolves a NULL unit_amount_cents from the customer pricelist (lead by email) and stamps metadata.pricelist_id (20260708050000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: POS line without unit price billed the happy-hour 12500 (total 31250 w/ 25% tax); subscription without amount created at the pricelist 420000.

capabilities.name: Pricelist version history
capabilities.verify: pricelist_revisions + AFTER INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE triggers on pricelists+pricelist_items + get_pricelist_history skill (20260708050000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: create revisions listed with full snapshots via the gateway.
